mapper.select:
SELECT FACTORY_CODE, MATERIAL_ID, MATERIAL_CODE, MATERIAL_NAME, MATERIAL_SPEC, MATERIAL_FLAG, UNIT, ISNULL(CODE1.CODE_NM, '') AS UNIT_NAME, STOCK_QTY, SAFETY_STOCK, ISNULL(ITEM_ONE_PER_QTY, '0') AS ITEM_ONE_PER_QTY, ISNULL(ITEM_CT_TIME, '0') AS ITEM_CT_TIME, ETC, ISNULL(STUFF(( SELECT ',' + FI.WORK_ORDER FROM TPR112 FI WHERE FI.PROD_CODE_ID = A.MATERIAL_ID FOR XML PATH(''), TYPE ).value('.', 'NVARCHAR(MAX)'), 1, 1, ''), '') AS PROCESS_FLOW_CODES, ISNULL(STUFF(( SELECT ',' + ISNULL(PF.WORK_ORDER_NM, '') FROM TPR112 FI LEFT JOIN TPR110 PF ON PF.WORK_ORDER_ID = FI.WORK_ORDER_ID AND PF.FACTORY_CODE = A.FACTORY_CODE AND ISNULL(PF.DELETE_FLAG, '') != '1' WHERE FI.PROD_CODE_ID = A.MATERIAL_ID FOR XML PATH(''), TYPE ).value('.', 'NVARCHAR(MAX)'), 1, 1, ''), '') AS PROCESS_FLOW_NAMES, INTERFACE_YN, CASE WHEN ISNULL(DELETE_FLAG, '0') = '1' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS DELETE_FLAG, OPMAN_CODE, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), OPTIME, 120) AS OPTIME, OPMAN_CODE2, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), OPTIME2, 120) AS OPTIME2 FROM TCO403 A LEFT JOIN MES_CCMMNDETAIL_CODE CODE1 ON CODE1.CODE_ID = 'COM007' AND CODE1.CODE = A.UNIT WHERE 1=1 AND FACTORY_CODE = #{factoryCode}
AND MATERIAL_CODE LIKE '%' + #{searchWrd} + '%'
AND MATERIAL_NAME LIKE '%' + #{searchWrd} + '%'
AND MATERIAL_SPEC LIKE '%' + #{searchWrd} + '%'
AND MATERIAL_FLAG = #{itemType}
AND DELETE_FLAG = CASE WHEN #{useYn} = 'Y' THEN '0' ELSE '1' END
AND DELETE_FLAG != '1'
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TPR112 FI WHERE FI.PROD_CODE_ID = A.MATERIAL_ID )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TPR112 FI WHERE FI.PROD_CODE_ID = A.MATERIAL_ID )
ORDER BY OPTIME DESC
OFFSET #{firstIndex} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{recordCountPerPage} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM TCO403 A WHERE 1=1 AND FACTORY_CODE = #{factoryCode}
AND MATERIAL_CODE LIKE '%' + #{searchWrd} + '%'
AND MATERIAL_NAME LIKE '%' + #{searchWrd} + '%'
AND MATERIAL_SPEC LIKE '%' + #{searchWrd} + '%'
AND MATERIAL_FLAG = #{itemType}
AND DELETE_FLAG = CASE WHEN #{useYn} = 'Y' THEN '0' ELSE '1' END
AND DELETE_FLAG != '1'
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TPR112 FI WHERE FI.PROD_CODE_ID = A.MATERIAL_ID )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TPR112 FI WHERE FI.PROD_CODE_ID = A.MATERIAL_ID )

SELECT FACTORY_CODE, MATERIAL_ID, MATERIAL_CODE, MATERIAL_NAME, MATERIAL_SPEC, MATERIAL_FLAG, UNIT, STOCK_QTY, SAFETY_STOCK, ISNULL(ITEM_ONE_PER_QTY, '0') AS ITEM_ONE_PER_QTY, ISNULL(ITEM_CT_TIME, '0') AS ITEM_CT_TIME, ETC, INTERFACE_YN, CASE WHEN ISNULL(DELETE_FLAG, '0') = '1' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS DELETE_FLAG, OPMAN_CODE, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), OPTIME, 120) AS OPTIME, OPMAN_CODE2, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), OPTIME2, 120) AS OPTIME2 FROM TCO403 WHERE MATERIAL_CODE = #{itemCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TCO403 ( FACTORY_CODE, MATERIAL_ID, MATERIAL_CODE, MATERIAL_NAME, MATERIAL_SPEC, MATERIAL_FLAG, UNIT, STOCK_QTY, SAFETY_STOCK, ITEM_ONE_PER_QTY, ITEM_CT_TIME, ETC, INTERFACE_YN, DELETE_FLAG, OPMAN_CODE, OPTIME ) VALUES ( #{factoryCode}, #{itemId}, #{itemCode}, #{itemName}, #{specification}, #{itemType}, #{unit}, ISNULL(#{stockQty}, '0'), ISNULL(#{safetyStock}, '0'), ISNULL(#{productionPerCycle}, '0'), ISNULL(#{cycleTime}, '0'), #{remark}, ISNULL(#{interfaceYn}, 'N'), CASE WHEN ISNULL(#{useYn}, 'N') = 'Y' THEN '0' ELSE '1' END, #{regUserId}, GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE TCO403 SET MATERIAL_CODE = #{itemCode}, MATERIAL_NAME = #{itemName}, MATERIAL_SPEC = #{specification}, MATERIAL_FLAG = #{itemType}, UNIT = #{unit}, STOCK_QTY = #{stockQty}, SAFETY_STOCK = #{safetyStock}, ITEM_ONE_PER_QTY = #{productionPerCycle}, ITEM_CT_TIME = #{cycleTime}, ETC = #{remark}, INTERFACE_YN = #{interfaceYn}, DELETE_FLAG = CASE WHEN #{useYn} = 'Y' THEN '0' ELSE '1' END, DELETE_DATE = CASE WHEN #{useYn} = 'Y' THEN '' ELSE GETDATE() END, OPMAN_CODE2 = #{updUserId}, OPTIME2 = GETDATE() WHERE FACTORY_CODE = #{factoryCode} AND MATERIAL_CODE = #{itemCode}
mapper.delete: UPDATE TCO403 SET DELETE_FLAG = '1', DELETE_DATE = GETDATE(), OPMAN_CODE2 = #{userId}, OPTIME2 = GETDATE() WHERE MATERIAL_CODE = #{itemCode}
